title: Italian Brainrot Pack
description: This texture pack is made for Italian Brainrot enjoyer.It has custom High resolution Italian brainrot textures
body:
# Italian Brainrot pack
I created This Texture Pack for Italian Brainrot Enjoyers.
I will update the Pack in future but for now this are the textures

The wools:
![Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84497f7148c7a4021816961bd6dede3ae0056de.png)

Items and armor
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f55e113e95fe20abb1bbaddd7b74b528667c00ac.png)


Thanks to the [Italian brainrot Wiki](https://italianbrainrot.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page) For providing elements for textures in the Pack
